# Data Source: okta_realms

Get a list of realms from Okta.

## Example Usage

{{tffile "/Users/rmcgregor/Development/terraform-provider-okta/examples/data-sources/okta_realms/data-source.tf"}}

<!-- schema generated by tfplugindocs -->
## Schema

### Optional

- `search` (String) Filter realms by profile.name using the contains operator.

### Read-Only

- `realms` (List of Object) The list of realms. (see [below for nested schema](#nestedatt--realms))

<a id="nestedatt--realms"></a>
### Nested Schema for `realms`

Read-Only:

- `id` (String)
- `is_default` (Boolean)
- `name` (String)
- `realm_type` (String)
